about-intro:
Full-Stack Developer building production-grade platforms for e-commerce, B2B distribution, ERP workflows, and manufacturing operations.
Transforms operational challenges into scalable digital solutions using React, FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and AI-powered automation.
about-tagline: Builds production-grade platforms — from B2C e-commerce to B2B distribution systems — that scale, automate, and deliver real business impact.
